ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency handling the request */,
  "complaint_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the request was made */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the request was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., Open, Closed, Assigned) */,
  "resolution_action_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the resolution action was updated */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution action */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the request */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the request (e.g., Online, Phone, In-person) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date and time the request was completed */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the requester upon completion (1-5 scale) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_complaint_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_type_id") REFERENCES complaint_types ("complaint_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., DOHMH, NYPD) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the agency */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agencies_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_types" (
  "complaint_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint type */,
  "complaint_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the complaint type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the complaint type (e.g., Environmental, Health) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the complaint type (e.g., Minor, Major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the location is situated */,
  "community_board" TEXT /* Community board of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "cross_street_1" TEXT /* Name of the first cross street */,
  "cross_street_2" TEXT /* Name of the second cross street */,
  "building_id" TEXT /* Building ID or structure identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_community_board FOREIGN KEY ("community_board") REFERENCES community_boards ("community_board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_borough FOREIGN KEY ("borough") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, agency staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's address */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the request */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was made */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of completion for the assigned task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., Status Change, Comment) */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update is urgent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the update */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date and time the status was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status before the update */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_types" (
  "agency_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency type */,
  "agency_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency type */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the agency type */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the agency type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "borough_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_boards" (
  "community_board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community board */,
  "community_board_name" TEXT /* Name of the community board */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_coordinates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests_locations" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id", "location_id")
)
